description: Removed deprecated follow, unfollow, and follow-status operations from the Users service to match [Spotify's February 2026 Web API removals](https://developer.spotify.com/documentation/web-api/references/changes/february-2026). Migrate to the generic library endpoints (`PUT /me/library`, `DELETE /me/library`, and `GET /me/library/contains`), which use Spotify URIs instead of resource IDs. ([#71](https://github.com/jonathan343/spotify-sdk/pull/71))
